titleStmt.title: SII 23.347: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 347. (A.R. No. 347 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 29: 1041-42 A.D.

summary.p: This also begins with the same introduction. It records a gift of land, half vēli and odd in extent, for a perpetual lamp in the temple by queen Vānavaṉmādēviyār the mother of Rājēndra-Chōḷa (No. 448 of 1918). The details of her relationship as also of the land are lost in the damaged portion. A reference is made to the land-survey evidently of the time of Rājarāja I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumanni vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyun taṉ
perun=teviyarāki(yi) Inpuṟa neṭutuyalūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭu tuṭar vaṉavelippaṭar vanavāciyu
ñ cuḷḷicūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyar mu
ṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻilmuṭiyum muṉnavarpakkal teṉnavar vaiytta cun=taramuṭiyum In=tira
nāramum teṉṟicai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟai maiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar
pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelaittol peruṅ kāvil palapaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ cinaviṟ
Irupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman mevaruñ cāntima ṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭi
yum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḷoṭu piṭiyi Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻḻarai Ilakkamum namanati kulappe
rumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai matirai maṇṭalamum kāmaṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷ
ḷiyum pācaṭai paḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirttiyum Ātiy naka ravaiyuḷ cattiraṉṟolkulat tintirarataṉai viḷaiyamar kkaḷattu
m piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikulam tanakkuvaiyum kiṭṭa Arum ceṟimulai Oṭṭaviṣayamum pū
curar cer naṟkocalaināṭu
m tanmapālanai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṇai muraṇurattākki
tekkaṇalāṭamum kovintacantaṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cā ral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkoṭṭamai va
ñ camar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yānaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāra mum nittilar neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamu m veṟi
malar tirteṟipuṉal geṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ pala kalañ celitti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅka panmanākiya ki
ṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyam porukaṭaṟ palakumpa k kariyoṭum (m)e kappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavar
ḻil vācalil viccātirat toraṇamum meyttoḷir puṉamaṉṉar maṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkata
muñcaṟainirp pannaiyum vaṉmalaiyyeyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻ kaṭalakaḻcūḷ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalvi
kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷappantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūrum
pukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamāvalviṉaimātamā(ta)liṅkamum kalā mutir kaṭuntiṟal Ilāmuritecamum tenakkavār
lmānakkavāramum toṭukaḻaṟkāval kaṭumuṟaṭkaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa koppara
kecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājendracoḷadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 9āvatu rājendrasiṅ
havaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭuc coḻamāttāṇṭac caruppetimaṅkalattu tiruvicalūr Uṭaiyārāna Uṭaiyār śrī
vānavaṉmāteviyārāṉa māteviyār vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu I nilamāvatu
ykālukku teṟku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu patināṟāñ catirattu Ulakaḷan taruḷiṉapaṭi nālemukkāṇi
Araikkāṇi kala tavatikku meṟkum kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum tevar nila kkiḻakku lukke teṟkum
naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Araiye mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi Araiye mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Itu panmāyeśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.347 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
